name: Storage Crate Black - Room Essentials™: Plastic Stackable Utility Bin, Portable with Built-In Handles, 30.6L Capacity
description: Discover the versatile Room Essentials™ Storage Crate, your go-to solution for countless storage needs! Featuring carry-through handles, this plastic bin is ideal for both storing and transporting. Stack multiple crates to maximize vertical space or create bookcase-style shelving by stacking them sideways. This file tote can efficiently organize and store letter-sized hanging files, as well as office, school, household, and garage essentials like notebooks, albums, sports gear, and cleaning supplies. The File Crate is also a popular solution to keep college dorm room necessities organized and contained. The overall assembled dimensions of this item are 15 5/8" L x 13 3/4" W x 10 5/8" H.
